member.name: T:Fantomas.Extras.IsPathIgnored
member.summary: The string argument is taken relative to the location of the ignore-file.

member.name: P:Fantomas.Extras.IgnoreFileModule.current
member.summary: When executed from the command line, Fantomas will not dynamically locate the most appropriate `.fantomasignore` for each input file; it only finds a single `.fantomasignore` file. This is that file.

member.name: M:Fantomas.Extras.IgnoreFileModule.find(System.IO.Abstractions.IFileSystem,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{System.String,Microsoft.FSharp.Core.FSharpFunc{System.String,System.Boolean}},System.String)
member.summary: Find the `.fantomasignore` file above the given filepath, if one exists. Note that this is intended for use only in the daemon; the command-line tool does not support `.fantomasignore` files anywhere other than the current working directory.

member.name: M:Fantomas.Extras.FakeHelpers.checkCode(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary:
Runs a check on the given files and reports the result to the given output:
* It shows the paths of the files that need formatting * It shows the path and the error message of files that failed the format check
Returns:
A record with the file names that were formatted and the files that encounter problems while formatting.
